nodes.name: Daily 7AM EST
nodes.notes: Daily schedule packet: wake up to today's content ready

json.prompt:
Format this as a brief daily content schedule packet. Include platform, time (EST), and status for each post:

{{ JSON.stringify($json.today) }}

Upcoming 3 days: {{ $json.upcoming_count }} posts scheduled.

Keep it concise, like a morning briefing.

nodes.name: Ollama: Format Packet
nodes.notes: Tier 2: Ollama 3B formats the daily schedule packet (fast, local)

parameters.subject: 📋 Today's Content Packet — {{ $json.today_count }} posts to publish
parameters.text:
{{ $json.formatted_packet }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔜 Coming up: {{ $json.upcoming_count }} posts in next 3 days

⏰ Remember: Post natively on each platform at the scheduled time.
   Copy-paste from Google Sheets Content Calendar.

—
ScoreMyPrompt Packing Assistant

meta.description: WF-5: Daily Content Schedule Packet. Reads Content Calendar → filters today's posts → Ollama formats briefing → emails you a morning packet. Packing Assistant model: you publish natively.
